name: node-red-contrib-unifi-ultimate
description: Node-RED nodes for Ubiquiti UniFi integrations, including UniFi Protect, UniFi Access, and UniFi Network.
author: Massimo Saccani

scripts.test: node --check nodes/unifi-access-config.js && node --check nodes/unifi-access-device.js && node --check nodes/unifi-network-config.js && node --check nodes/unifi-network-control-poe.js && node --check nodes/unifi-network-device.js && node --check nodes/unifi-network-presence.js && node --check nodes/unifi-protect-config.js && node --check nodes/unifi-protect-device.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-access-utils.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-access-device-registry.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-network-utils.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-network-device-registry.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-protect-utils.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-protect-field-metadata.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-protect-device-registry.js
